```{r Functions to load in single cell data, echo = FALSE}
      SET_PAIR = paste0(SET_NAME,'_PAIR_08ExVsEx'),
      SET_PAIR_REP_ISOFORM = paste0(SET_PAIR,'_',Experiment_Rep,'_',ISOFORM))
  
  alt_pair08ex1vsboth <- DATASET %>% 
    dplyr::filter(SET_PAIR == paste0(SET_NAME,'_PAIR_08') & ISOFORM == 'WT' | SET_PAIR == paste0(SET_NAME,'_PAIR_09') & ISOFORM == 'WT') %>% 
    dplyr::mutate(
      ISOFORM = case_when(SET_PAIR == paste0(SET_NAME,'_PAIR_08') & ISOFORM == 'WT' ~ 'Ex1',
                          SET_PAIR == paste0(SET_NAME,'_PAIR_09') & ISOFORM == 'WT' ~ 'Both'),
      SET_PAIR = paste0(SET_NAME,'_PAIR_08Ex1VsBoth'),
      SET_PAIR_REP_ISOFORM = paste0(SET_PAIR,'_',Experiment_Rep,'_',ISOFORM))
  
  #Creating dataset with alterantive comparisons (and controls)
  Transfected_only_without_outliers_D_ALTERNATIVE_COMPARISONS <- DATASET %>% 
    dplyr::filter(SET_PAIR %in% c('SET_D_PAIR_MCHERRY','SET_D_PAIR_RAB5A', 'SET_E_PAIR_MCHERRY','SET_E_PAIR_RAB5A')) %>% 
    bind_rows(., alt_pair01_wt57, alt_pair01_wt168, alt_pair01_dexdex, alt_pair08altex, alt_pair08bothex, alt_pair08exvsex, alt_pair08ex1vsboth) %>% 
    na.omit()
  
  return(Transfected_only_without_outliers_D_ALTERNATIVE_COMPARISONS)
}

#Note, function also removes NAN columns and zero colummns
Identify_and_remove_outliers <- function(DATASET,
                                         USE_LOWER_MAX_UPPER_HINGE,
                                         ONLY_NEGTRANS = FALSE,
                                         REMOVE_TOP_x_PERCENTILE_NEGATIVE = FALSE,
                                         TOP_x_PERCENTILE = 0.1,
                                         REMOVE_SAME_COLS_AS_TRANSFECTED = FALSE,
                                         TRANSFECTED_DATASET_FOR_COLS_TO_KEEP = NULL
                                         ){
  TRANSFECTED_ONLY <- DATASET %>% 
    dplyr::filter(TRANSFECTED == TRUE)
  #In the case that only nontransfected cells are in the original dataset, we don't want to remove them by filtering (as we don't have any cells left then)
  if(ONLY_NEGTRANS == TRUE){
    TRANSFECTED_ONLY <- DATASET 
  }
  if(ONLY_NEGTRANS == TRUE & REMOVE_TOP_x_PERCENTILE_NEGATIVE == TRUE){
    #Read in dataset
    TRANSFECTED_ONLY <- DATASET %>% 
      # Group by the variables of interest
      group_by(SET_PAIR, Experiment_Rep, ISOFORM) %>%
      # Arrange within groups by intensity (descending)
      arrange(desc(Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
      # Calculate the percentile within each group
      mutate(percentile = row_number()/n()) %>%
      # Keep only the bottom 80%
      filter(percentile > TOP_x_PERCENTILE) %>%
      # Remove the helper column
      select(-percentile) %>%
      # Ungroup to remove grouping structure
      ungroup()
  }
  
  SUMMARY_STATISTICS <- TRANSFECTED_ONLY %>%
    dplyr::mutate('LOG_INTENSITY' = log10(Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR)) %>% 
    ungroup() %>% 
    group_by(SET_PAIR, Experiment_Rep, ISOFORM) %>% 
    summarise(n_cells = length(SET_PAIR),
              MEAN_INTENSITY = mean(Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR),
              MEDIAN_INTENSITY = mean(Intensity_MedianIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR),
              SD_INTENSITY = sd(Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR),
              LOG_MEAN_INTENSITY = mean(LOG_INTENSITY),
              LOG_SD_INTENSITY = sd(LOG_INTENSITY),
              UPPER_HINGE_IQRx1.5 = quantile(Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR, probs = 0.75) + 1.5 * (quantile(Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR, probs = 0.75) - quantile(Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR, probs = 0.25))) %>% 
    dplyr::mutate('SET_PAIR_REP_ISOFORM' = paste0(SET_PAIR,'_',Experiment_Rep,'_',ISOFORM))
  
  #Can be used to remove the skew of very bright cells if present in one isoform but not another (simply allows using the highest UPPER hing value from one isoform as the filter for the other isoform)
  MAX_INTENSITY_CUTOFF_SET_BASED <- SUMMARY_STATISTICS %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    group_by(SET_PAIR, ISOFORM) %>%
    summarise('MAX_UPPER_HINGE' = max(UPPER_HINGE_IQRx1.5)) %>% 
    ungroup() %>% 
    group_by(SET_PAIR) %>% 
    summarise('LOWER_MAX_UPPER_HINGE' = min(MAX_UPPER_HINGE))
  #
  
  SUMMARY_STATISTICS_OUTLIER_CRITERIUM <- SUMMARY_STATISTICS %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    dplyr::select(SET_PAIR_REP_ISOFORM,
                  UPPER_HINGE_IQRx1.5)
  
  Transfected_cells_outliers_removed <-TRANSFECTED_ONLY %>%
    dplyr::mutate('SET_PAIR_REP_ISOFORM' = paste0(SET_PAIR,'_',Experiment_Rep,'_',ISOFORM),
                  'LOG_INTENSITY' = log10(Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR)) %>% 
    dplyr::mutate('Intensity_Edge_mean_norm' = Intensity_MeanIntensityEdge_MCHERRY_BACKCORR / Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR,
                  'Intensity_Edge_max_norm' = Intensity_MeanIntensityEdge_MCHERRY_BACKCORR / Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR,
                  'Intensity_Max_mean_norm' = Intensity_MaxIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR / Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR,
                  'Intensity_MassDisp_mean_norm' = Intensity_MassDisplacement_MCHERRY_BACKCORR / Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR,
                  'Intensity_Std_mean_norm' = Intensity_StdIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR / Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR,
                  'Intensity_MAD_mean_norm' = Intensity_MADIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR / Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR) %>% 
    dplyr::left_join(x = ., y = SUMMARY_STATISTICS_OUTLIER_CRITERIUM, by = c('SET_PAIR_REP_ISOFORM' = 'SET_PAIR_REP_ISOFORM')) %>%
    dplyr::filter(Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR < UPPER_HINGE_IQRx1.5) %>%
    dplyr::select(c(1:10,'SET_PAIR_REP_ISOFORM','LOG_INTENSITY','UPPER_HINGE_IQRx1.5', everything()))
  
  if(USE_LOWER_MAX_UPPER_HINGE == TRUE){
    Transfected_cells_outliers_removed <- Transfected_cells_outliers_removed %>% 
      dplyr::left_join(x = ., y = MAX_INTENSITY_CUTOFF_SET_BASED, by = c('SET_PAIR' = 'SET_PAIR')) %>% 
      dplyr::filter(Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR < LOWER_MAX_UPPER_HINGE)
  }
  
  
  
  #Seems to remove columns with NANs and no variance
  FEATURE_START <- 14
  SET_PAIRS <- Transfected_cells_outliers_removed %>% 
    dplyr::filter(!c(word(SET_PAIR, 4,4, sep = fixed('_')) == 'NEGATIVE'),
                  !c(word(SET_PAIR, 4,4, sep = fixed('_')) == 'MCHERRY')) %>% 
    dplyr::pull(SET_PAIR) %>% 
    unique()
  
  CONSTANT_COLS <-c()
  NAN_COLS <- c()
  FEATURES <- colnames(Transfected_cells_outliers_removed)
  FEATURE_END <- length(colnames(Transfected_cells_outliers_removed))
  for(i in SET_PAIRS){
    PAIR_x_df <- Transfected_cells_outliers_removed %>% 
      dplyr::filter(SET_PAIR == i)
    
    for(j in FEATURE_START:FEATURE_END){
      constant_value <- length(unique(PAIR_x_df[[j]]))
      NAN_value <- any(is.na(PAIR_x_df[[j]]))
      
      if(constant_value == 1){
        CONSTANT_COLS <- c(CONSTANT_COLS, j)
      }
      if(NAN_value == TRUE){
        NAN_COLS <- c(NAN_COLS, j)
      }
    }
  }
  CONSTANT_FEATURES <- FEATURES[CONSTANT_COLS]
  NAN_FEATURES <- FEATURES[NAN_COLS]
  FEATURES_TO_REMOVE <- c(unique(CONSTANT_FEATURES), unique(NAN_FEATURES)) #REMOVES 8 VARIABLES FOR SET A (MOSTLY Manders Correlation)
  TEXT_CONSTANT <- paste0('The variables with CONSTANT values for at least one PAIR are: ', unique(CONSTANT_FEATURES))
  TEXT_NULL <- paste0('The variables with MISSING values for at least one PAIR are: ', unique(NAN_FEATURES))
  print(TEXT_CONSTANT)
  print(TEXT_NULL)
  
  
  Transfected_cells_outliers_removed_REDUCED_COLS <- Transfected_cells_outliers_removed %>% 
    dplyr::select(!c(all_of(FEATURES_TO_REMOVE))) #%>% 
  #dplyr::select(!(c(starts_with('Intensity') & ends_with('MCHERRY_BACKCORR'))))
  
  if(ONLY_NEGTRANS == TRUE & REMOVE_SAME_COLS_AS_TRANSFECTED == TRUE){
    Transfected_cells_outliers_removed_REDUCED_COLS <- Transfected_cells_outliers_removed %>%
      dplyr::select(c(colnames(TRANSFECTED_DATASET_FOR_COLS_TO_KEEP)))
  }
  
  
  SUMMARY_STATISTICS_OUTLIERS_REMOVED <- Transfected_cells_outliers_removed %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    group_by(SET_PAIR, Experiment_Rep, ISOFORM) %>% 
    summarise(n_cells = length(SET_PAIR),
              MEAN_INTENSITY = mean(Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR),
              MEDIAN_INTENSITY = mean(Intensity_MedianIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR),
              SD_INTENSITY = sd(Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR),
              LOG_MEAN_INTENSITY = mean(LOG_INTENSITY),
              LOG_SD_INTENSITY = sd(LOG_INTENSITY),
              UPPER_HINGE_IQRx1.5 = quantile(Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR, probs = 0.75) + 1.5 * (quantile(Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR, probs = 0.75) - quantile(Intensity_MeanIntensity_MCHERRY_BACKCORR, probs = 0.25))) %>% 
    dplyr::mutate('SET_PAIR_REP_ISOFORM' = paste0(SET_PAIR,'_',Experiment_Rep,'_',ISOFORM))
  
  
  return(list(Transfected_cells_outliers_removed_REDUCED_COLS, SUMMARY_STATISTICS, SUMMARY_STATISTICS_OUTLIERS_REMOVED))
}

```



```{r Loading in and creating filtered cell datasets, echo=FALSE, warning = FALSE}
# Loading in single cell data
# SET 1A
#AGGREGATING SET 1 AND SET A
SET_1_FOR_FUSION <- Load_transfected_cells_and_summary(SET = 'SET_1')[[1]] %>% 
  dplyr::filter(!c(SET_PAIR %in% c('SET_1_PAIR_06')))
#
SET_A_FOR_FUSION <- Load_transfected_cells_and_summary(SET = 'SET_A')[[1]]
TRANSFECTED_SET_1Aagg <- bind_rows(SET_1_FOR_FUSION,
                                   SET_A_FOR_FUSION)
#SET B
TRANSFECTED_SET_B <- Load_transfected_cells_and_summary(SET = 'SET_B')[[1]]
#SET C
TRANSFECTED_SET_C <- Load_transfected_cells_and_summary(SET = 'SET_C')[[1]]
#SET D
TRANSFECTED_SET_D <- Load_transfected_cells_and_summary(SET = 'SET_D')[[1]] %>% 
  dplyr::filter(!c(SET_PAIR == 'SET_D_PAIR_NegativeGolgin97'))


# Reduced transfected datasets
# Postrans
Reduced_transfected_B <- remove_non_mcherry_vars(TRANSFECTED_SET_B, ONLY_TRANSFECTED = TRUE, REDUCE_FEATURES = TRUE)
Reduced_transfected_C <- remove_non_mcherry_vars(TRANSFECTED_SET_C, ONLY_TRANSFECTED = TRUE, REDUCE_FEATURES = TRUE)
Reduced_transfected_D <- remove_non_mcherry_vars(TRANSFECTED_SET_D, ONLY_TRANSFECTED = TRUE, REDUCE_FEATURES = TRUE)
Reduced_transfected_1Aagg <- remove_non_mcherry_vars(TRANSFECTED_SET_1Aagg, ONLY_TRANSFECTED = TRUE, REDUCE_FEATURES = TRUE)

# Negtrans
Reduced_negtrans_B <- remove_non_mcherry_vars(TRANSFECTED_SET_B, ONLY_TRANSFECTED = FALSE, REDUCE_FEATURES = TRUE, ONLY_NEGTRANSFECTED = TRUE)
Reduced_negtrans_C <- remove_non_mcherry_vars(TRANSFECTED_SET_C, ONLY_TRANSFECTED = FALSE, REDUCE_FEATURES = TRUE, ONLY_NEGTRANSFECTED = TRUE)
Reduced_negtrans_D <- remove_non_mcherry_vars(TRANSFECTED_SET_D, ONLY_TRANSFECTED = FALSE, REDUCE_FEATURES = TRUE, ONLY_NEGTRANSFECTED = TRUE)
Reduced_negtrans_1Aagg <- remove_non_mcherry_vars(TRANSFECTED_SET_1Aagg, ONLY_TRANSFECTED = FALSE, REDUCE_FEATURES = TRUE, ONLY_NEGTRANSFECTED = TRUE)



# Identify and remove outliers
# Pos trans
Transfected_only_without_outliers_1A <- Identify_and_remove_outliers(Reduced_transfected_1Aagg, 
                                                                     USE_LOWER_MAX_UPPER_HINGE = TRUE)[[1]]

Transfected_only_without_outliers_B <- Identify_and_remove_outliers(Reduced_transfected_B, 
                                                                    USE_LOWER_MAX_UPPER_HINGE = TRUE)[[1]]

Transfected_only_without_outliers_C <- Identify_and_remove_outliers(Reduced_transfected_C, 
                                                                    USE_LOWER_MAX_UPPER_HINGE = TRUE)[[1]]

Transfected_only_without_outliers_D <- Identify_and_remove_outliers(Reduced_transfected_D, 
                                                                    USE_LOWER_MAX_UPPER_HINGE = TRUE)[[1]]

# Neg trans
#Set 1A
NegTransfected_only_without_outliers_1A <- Identify_and_remove_outliers(Reduced_negtrans_1Aagg, 
                                                                     USE_LOWER_MAX_UPPER_HINGE = TRUE,
                                                                     ONLY_NEGTRANS = TRUE,
                                                                     REMOVE_TOP_x_PERCENTILE_NEGATIVE = TRUE,
                                                                     TOP_x_PERCENTILE = 0.1,
                                                                     REMOVE_SAME_COLS_AS_TRANSFECTED = TRUE,
                                                                     TRANSFECTED_DATASET_FOR_COLS_TO_KEEP = Transfected_only_without_outliers_1A)[[1]]
#Set B
NegTransfected_only_without_outliers_B <- Identify_and_remove_outliers(Reduced_negtrans_B, 
                                                                    USE_LOWER_MAX_UPPER_HINGE = TRUE,
                                                                    ONLY_NEGTRANS = TRUE,
                                                                    REMOVE_TOP_x_PERCENTILE_NEGATIVE = TRUE,
                                                                    TOP_x_PERCENTILE = 0.1,
                                                                    REMOVE_SAME_COLS_AS_TRANSFECTED = TRUE,
                                                                    TRANSFECTED_DATASET_FOR_COLS_TO_KEEP = Transfected_only_without_outliers_B)[[1]]
#Set C
NegTransfected_only_without_outliers_C <- Identify_and_remove_outliers(DATASET = Reduced_negtrans_C, 
                                                                    USE_LOWER_MAX_UPPER_HINGE = TRUE,
                                                                    ONLY_NEGTRANS = TRUE,
                                                                    REMOVE_TOP_x_PERCENTILE_NEGATIVE = TRUE,
                                                                    TOP_x_PERCENTILE = 0.1,
                                                                    REMOVE_SAME_COLS_AS_TRANSFECTED = TRUE,
                                                                    TRANSFECTED_DATASET_FOR_COLS_TO_KEEP = Transfected_only_without_outliers_C)[[1]]
#Set D
NegTransfected_only_without_outliers_D <- Identify_and_remove_outliers(Reduced_negtrans_D, 
                                                                    USE_LOWER_MAX_UPPER_HINGE = TRUE,
                                                                    ONLY_NEGTRANS = TRUE,
                                                                    REMOVE_TOP_x_PERCENTILE_NEGATIVE = TRUE,
                                                                    TOP_x_PERCENTILE = 0.1,
                                                                    REMOVE_SAME_COLS_AS_TRANSFECTED = TRUE,
                                                                    TRANSFECTED_DATASET_FOR_COLS_TO_KEEP = Transfected_only_without_outliers_D)[[1]]

#For SET 1 + A FUSION,
#Note, we collapse the two sets into a collective SET_1A. The information is retained in Reps, as Set1's reps are rep1-3, and SetA's reps are reps 4-6
Transfected_without_outliers_1A_for_classifier <- Transfected_only_without_outliers_1A %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Experiment_Rep = case_when(Experiment_Set == 'SET_1' & Experiment_Rep == 'REP_1' ~ 'REP_1',
                                           Experiment_Set == 'SET_1' & Experiment_Rep == 'REP_2' ~ 'REP_2',
                                           Experiment_Set == 'SET_1' & Experiment_Rep == 'REP_3' ~ 'REP_3',
                                           Experiment_Set == 'SET_A' & Experiment_Rep == 'REP_1' ~ 'REP_4',
                                           Experiment_Set == 'SET_A' & Experiment_Rep == 'REP_2' ~ 'REP_5',
                                           Experiment_Set == 'SET_A' & Experiment_Rep == 'REP_3' ~ 'REP_6')) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Experiment_Set = 'SET_1A') %>%
  dplyr::mutate(SET_PAIR = paste0(Experiment_Set,'_',word(SET_PAIR, start = 3, end = 4, sep = fixed("_"))),
                SET_PAIR_REP_ISOFORM = paste0(SET_PAIR,'_',Experiment_Rep,'_',ISOFORM)) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(!c(ISOFORM == 'NEGATIVE')) %>% 
  na.omit()
#Negative transfectants set 1 + A fusion
NegTransfected_without_outliers_1A_for_classifier <- NegTransfected_only_without_outliers_1A %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Experiment_Rep = case_when(Experiment_Set == 'SET_1' & Experiment_Rep == 'REP_1' ~ 'REP_1',
                                           Experiment_Set == 'SET_1' & Experiment_Rep == 'REP_2' ~ 'REP_2',
                                           Experiment_Set == 'SET_1' & Experiment_Rep == 'REP_3' ~ 'REP_3',
                                           Experiment_Set == 'SET_A' & Experiment_Rep == 'REP_1' ~ 'REP_4',
                                           Experiment_Set == 'SET_A' & Experiment_Rep == 'REP_2' ~ 'REP_5',
                                           Experiment_Set == 'SET_A' & Experiment_Rep == 'REP_3' ~ 'REP_6')) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Experiment_Set = 'SET_1A') %>%
  dplyr::mutate(SET_PAIR = paste0(Experiment_Set,'_',word(SET_PAIR, start = 3, end = 4, sep = fixed("_"))),
                SET_PAIR_REP_ISOFORM = paste0(SET_PAIR,'_',Experiment_Rep,'_',ISOFORM)) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(!c(ISOFORM == 'NEGATIVE')) %>% 
  na.omit()


### Set 1A, alternative comparisons
#PositiveTransfectants
Transfected_only_without_outliers_1A_ALTERNATIVE_COMPARISONS <- alternative_comparisons_set_1A(Transfected_without_outliers_1A_for_classifier, SET_NAME = 'SET_1A')%>% 
  dplyr::mutate(ISOFORM = case_when(ISOFORM == 'WT' ~ 'WT',
                                    ISOFORM == 'DEx' ~ 'DEx',
                                    ISOFORM == 'Both' ~ 'WT',
                                    ISOFORM == 'PanEx' ~ 'WT',
                                    ISOFORM == 'Ex1' ~ 'DEx',
                                    ISOFORM == 'MCHERRY' ~ 'MCHERRY'))
#NegativeTransfectants
NegTransfected_only_without_outliers_1A_ALTERNATIVE_COMPARISONS <- alternative_comparisons_set_1A(NegTransfected_without_outliers_1A_for_classifier, SET_NAME = 'SET_1A') %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(ISOFORM = case_when(ISOFORM == 'WT' ~ 'WT',
                                    ISOFORM == 'DEx' ~ 'DEx',
                                    ISOFORM == 'Both' ~ 'WT',
                                    ISOFORM == 'PanEx' ~ 'WT',
                                    ISOFORM == 'Ex1' ~ 'DEx',
                                    ISOFORM == 'MCHERRY' ~ 'MCHERRY'))


### Set D/E, Alternative comparisons)
#Set D, positive transfectants
#View(Transfected_only_without_outliers_D_ALTERNATIVE_COMPARISONS )
Transfected_only_without_outliers_D_ALTERNATIVE_COMPARISONS <- alternative_comparisons_set_D(DATASET = Transfected_only_without_outliers_D, SET_NAME = 'SET_D') %>% #dplyr::select(SET_PAIR, ISOFORM) %>% distinct()
  dplyr::mutate(ISOFORM = case_when(
    SET_PAIR == 'SET_D_PAIR_01dex57VS168' & ISOFORM == 'DEx168nt' ~ 'DEx',
    SET_PAIR == 'SET_D_PAIR_01dex57VS168' & ISOFORM == 'DEx57nt' ~ 'WT',
    #
    SET_PAIR == 'SET_D_PAIR_08DExVSaltEx' & ISOFORM == 'AltEx' ~ 'WT',
    #
    SET_PAIR == 'SET_D_PAIR_08Ex1VsBoth' & ISOFORM == 'Both' ~ 'WT',
    SET_PAIR == 'SET_D_PAIR_08Ex1VsBoth' & ISOFORM == 'Ex1' ~ 'DEx',
    #
    SET_PAIR == 'SET_D_PAIR_08ExVsEx' & ISOFORM == 'Ex1' ~ 'DEx',
    SET_PAIR == 'SET_D_PAIR_08ExVsEx' & ISOFORM == 'Ex2' ~ 'WT',
    #
    SET_PAIR == 'SET_D_PAIR_08bothEx' & ISOFORM == 'Both' ~ 'WT',
    .default = ISOFORM
  ))

#Set D, negative transfectants
NegTransfected_only_without_outliers_D_ALTERNATIVE_COMPARISONS <- alternative_comparisons_set_D(DATASET = NegTransfected_only_without_outliers_D, SET_NAME = 'SET_D') %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(ISOFORM = case_when(
    SET_PAIR == 'SET_D_PAIR_01dex57VS168' & ISOFORM == 'DEx168' ~ 'DEx',
    SET_PAIR == 'SET_D_PAIR_01dex57VS168' & ISOFORM == 'DEx57' ~ 'WT',
    #
    SET_PAIR == 'SET_D_PAIR_08DExVSaltEx' & ISOFORM == 'AltEx' ~ 'WT',
    #
    SET_PAIR == 'SET_D_PAIR_08Ex1VsBoth' & ISOFORM == 'Both' ~ 'WT',
    SET_PAIR == 'SET_D_PAIR_08Ex1VsBoth' & ISOFORM == 'Ex1' ~ 'DEx',
    #
    SET_PAIR == 'SET_D_PAIR_08ExVsEx' & ISOFORM == 'Ex1' ~ 'DEx',
    SET_PAIR == 'SET_D_PAIR_08ExVsEx' & ISOFORM == 'Ex2' ~ 'WT',
    #
    SET_PAIR == 'SET_D_PAIR_08bothEx' & ISOFORM == 'Both' ~ 'WT',
    .default = ISOFORM
  ))
```


#### SNX2 variable importance
```{r SNX2 variable importance plots, echo=FALSE}
SNX2_var_import_plots <- generate_gene_plots(IMPORTANCE_DATA = combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg, 
                                CELL_DATA = Transfected_without_outliers_1A_for_classifier, 
                                gene_name = 'SNX2',
                                ratio_threshold = ratio_threshold, 
                                ratio_times_importance_threshold = ratio_times_importance_threshold,
                                n = 5)
SNX2_var_import_plots$main_importance_plot
SNX2_var_import_plots$top_features_bar_plot
SNX2_var_import_plots$feature_dot_plots[[1]]
SNX2_var_import_plots$feature_dot_plots[[2]]
SNX2_var_import_plots$feature_dot_plots[[3]]

```
#### ANK2 variable importance
```{r ANK2 variable importance plots, echo=FALSE}
ANK2_var_import_plots <- generate_gene_plots(IMPORTANCE_DATA = combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg, 
                                CELL_DATA = Transfected_without_outliers_1A_for_classifier, 
                                gene_name = 'ANK2',
                                ratio_threshold = ratio_threshold, 
                                ratio_times_importance_threshold = ratio_times_importance_threshold,
                                n = 5)
ANK2_var_import_plots$main_importance_plot
ANK2_var_import_plots$top_features_bar_plot
ANK2_var_import_plots$feature_dot_plots[[1]]
ANK2_var_import_plots$feature_dot_plots[[2]]
ANK2_var_import_plots$feature_dot_plots[[3]]
```
#### NUMB variable importance
```{r NUMB variable importance plots, echo=FALSE}
NUMB_var_import_plots <- generate_gene_plots(IMPORTANCE_DATA = combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg, 
                                CELL_DATA = Transfected_without_outliers_1A_for_classifier, 
                                gene_name = 'NUMB',
                                ratio_threshold = ratio_threshold, 
                                ratio_times_importance_threshold = ratio_times_importance_threshold,
                                n = 1)
NUMB_var_import_plots$main_importance_plot
NUMB_var_import_plots$top_features_bar_plot
NUMB_var_import_plots$feature_dot_plots[[1]]
#NUMB_var_import_plots$feature_dot_plots[[2]]
#NUMB_var_import_plots$feature_dot_plots[[3]]



```
#### OCRL variable importance
```{r OCRL variable importance plots, echo=FALSE}
OCRL_var_import_plots <- generate_gene_plots(IMPORTANCE_DATA = combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg, 
                                CELL_DATA = Transfected_only_without_outliers_C, 
                                gene_name = 'OCRL',
                                ratio_threshold = ratio_threshold, 
                                ratio_times_importance_threshold = ratio_times_importance_threshold,
                                n = 5)
OCRL_var_import_plots$main_importance_plot
OCRL_var_import_plots$top_features_bar_plot
OCRL_var_import_plots$feature_dot_plots[[1]]
OCRL_var_import_plots$feature_dot_plots[[2]]
OCRL_var_import_plots$feature_dot_plots[[3]]
```
#### FBXW11 variable importance
```{r FBXW11 variable importance plots, echo=FALSE}
FBXW11_var_import_plots <- generate_gene_plots(IMPORTANCE_DATA = combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg, 
                                CELL_DATA = Transfected_without_outliers_1A_for_classifier, 
                                gene_name = 'FBXW11',
                                ratio_threshold = ratio_threshold, 
                                ratio_times_importance_threshold = ratio_times_importance_threshold,
                                n = 5)
FBXW11_var_import_plots$main_importance_plot
FBXW11_var_import_plots$top_features_bar_plot
FBXW11_var_import_plots$feature_dot_plots[[1]]
FBXW11_var_import_plots$feature_dot_plots[[2]]
FBXW11_var_import_plots$feature_dot_plots[[3]]
```


## Recurring important features
```{r ranking features and some numbers, echo=FALSE}
# Number of isoform classifiers that are statistically significant (bootstrap) - exlcuding controls
Isoform_classifiers_w_diff_isoforms <- combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Gene_name != 'PosControl') %>% 
  dplyr::filter(adj_significant == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::pull(Gene_name)

# Total number of features
Total_features_used_for_classification <- combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg %>% 
  dplyr::filter(!Feature == 'Intensity_Edge_max_norm') %>% 
  dplyr::pull(Feature) %>% 
  unique()

# Feature classes df
Feature_classes <- bind_cols('Feature' = Total_features_used_for_classification) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(major_class = word(Feature, start = 1, end = 1, sep = fixed('_'))) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(minor_class = word(Feature, start = 1, end = 2, sep = fixed('_')))

# Vector of the major feature claseses
Major_feature_classes <- Feature_classes %>% 
  dplyr::pull(major_class) %>% 
  unique()

# Vector of the minor feature claseses
Minor_feature_classes <- Feature_classes %>% 
  dplyr::pull(minor_class) %>% 
  unique()

# Feature order based on how many times they are recurring as noteworthy
Represented_feature_classes <- combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Gene_name != 'PosControl') %>% 
  dplyr::filter(adj_significant == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(noteworthy_feature == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(!Feature == 'Intensity_Edge_max_norm') %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(major_class = word(Feature, start = 1, end = 1, sep = fixed('_'))) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(minor_class = word(Feature, start = 1, end = 2, sep = fixed('_')))

#Creating dataframe of the minor feature classes that are noteworthy (only doing for minor as all major ones are represented)
Represented_minor_classes <- Represented_feature_classes$minor_class %>% 
  unique()


###USE THE FEATURE_CLASSES DF TO JUST BRIEFLY DETERMINE HOW LARGE A PROPORTION OF THE SUB_CLASSES IN EACH MAJOR CLASS ARE Represented_feature_classes ###

# Recurring features order
Recurring_features_order <- combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Gene_name != 'PosControl') %>% 
  dplyr::filter(adj_significant == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(noteworthy_feature == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(!Feature == 'Intensity_Edge_max_norm') %>% 
  group_by(Feature) %>% 
  summarize(n = n(),
            percent_of_all = n/length(unique(Isoform_classifiers_w_diff_isoforms))) %>% 
  #Arrange with lowest on top
  dplyr::arrange(n) %>% 
  dplyr::pull(Feature)


# Summary of these numbers
print(paste('The number of features used for clasisfication are:', length(Total_features_used_for_classification)))
print(paste(length(Recurring_features_order), 'are noteworthy in at least one of the:',length(unique(Isoform_classifiers_w_diff_isoforms)),'statistically siginficant (boostrap confidence intervals) classifiers.'))
print(paste('That is',(length(Recurring_features_order)/length(Total_features_used_for_classification))*100,'%.'))
print(paste('We used features within 6 major feature groups for the classifiers. These were:',Major_feature_classes))
print(paste('All major classes were represented as a noteworthy feature at least once',all(Major_feature_classes %in% Represented_feature_classes$major_class)))
print(paste('We used',length(Minor_feature_classes),' minor features classes the mmajor clases for the classifiers.'))
print(paste('All minor classes were represented as a noteworthy feature at least once',all(Minor_feature_classes %in% Represented_feature_classes$minor_class)))
print(paste(length(Represented_minor_classes),'were represented as a noteworthy feature at least one.'))
print(paste('That is',(length(Represented_minor_classes)/length(Minor_feature_classes))*100,'% of minor classes.'))
```
### USE THE FEATURE_CLASSES DF TO JUST BRIEFLY DETERMINE HOW LARGE A PROPORTION OF THE SUB_CLASSES IN EACH MAJOR CLASS ARE Represented_feature_classes

```{r Plot of recurring features, echo = FALSE}
# How many of the features are used for classification?
bind_cols(n_features = c((length(Total_features_used_for_classification) - length(unique(Represented_feature_classes$Feature))),
                         length(unique(Represented_feature_classes$Feature))),
          noteworthy_feature = c(FALSE, TRUE)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = noteworthy_feature, y = n_features))+
  geom_col()+
  labs(title = 'Features "Noteworthy" at least 1 time',
       y = 'Count (n)',
       x = 'Noteworthy')+
  theme_bw(base_size = 16)


# Count of feature represenation in major categories. Occurs at least 1
Represented_feature_classes %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  # Counts the number of times each feature occur
  dplyr::select(Feature, major_class) %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  group_by(major_class) %>%
  summarize(n_features_noteworthy = n()) %>% 
  # The plot
  ggplot(aes(y = fct_reorder(major_class, n_features_noteworthy), x = n_features_noteworthy))+
  geom_col()+
  labs(title = 'Number of "Noteworthy" features in each major category',
       subtitle = 'Occurs at least 1 time',
       y = 'Main Feature groups',
       x = 'Count')+
  theme_bw(base_size = 16)




# How large a proportion of the subclasses within a major class are used?
# Counting the degree to which minor from each major class are represented
Represented_feature_classes %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  # Counts the number of times each feature occur
  group_by(Feature, major_class, minor_class) %>%
  summarize(n_feature_recurrence = n()) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(n_feature_recurrence >= 1) %>% 
  # Counts how many of the minor classes are represented 
  ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::select(major_class, minor_class) %>%
  distinct() %>% 
  group_by(major_class) %>% 
  summarize(n_occurence = n()) %>% 
  #
  dplyr::right_join(x = ., y = Feature_classes %>% 
                      ungroup() %>% 
                      dplyr::select(major_class, minor_class) %>% 
                      distinct() %>% 
                      group_by(major_class) %>% 
                      summarize(n_total = n()),
                    by = join_by(major_class)
) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(n_occurence = if_else(is.na(n_occurence),0,n_occurence),
                proportion_represented = n_occurence/n_total) %>% 
  dplyr::arrange(proportion_represented) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  # The plot
  ggplot(aes(y = fct_reorder(major_class,proportion_represented), x = proportion_represented))+
  geom_col()+
  geom_text(aes(x = 0.9, label = paste(n_occurence,'/',n_total)))+
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0,1))+
  labs(title = 'Proportion of sub-feature groups occuring as "Noteworthy"',
       subtitle = 'Occurs at least 1 time',
       y = 'Main Feature groups',
       x = 'Proportion of subgroups occuring')+
  theme_bw(base_size = 16)



# How often are the noteworthy features used?
combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Gene_name != 'PosControl') %>% 
  dplyr::filter(adj_significant == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(noteworthy_feature == TRUE) %>% 
    dplyr::filter(!Feature == 'Intensity_Edge_max_norm') %>% 
  group_by(Feature) %>% 
  summarize(n = n(),
            percent_of_all = n/length(unique(Isoform_classifiers_w_diff_isoforms))) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Feature = factor(Feature, levels = Recurring_features_order)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = n))+
  geom_histogram(bins = 4)+
    labs(title = 'Recurrence of "Noteworthy" features',
          y = 'Count (n)',
          x = 'No. of occurences')+
  theme_bw(base_size = 16)


# Count plot of all features and their recurrence that shows feature name
combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Gene_name != 'PosControl') %>% 
  dplyr::filter(adj_significant == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(noteworthy_feature == TRUE) %>% 
    dplyr::filter(!Feature == 'Intensity_Edge_max_norm') %>% 
  group_by(Feature) %>% 
  summarize(n = n(),
            percent_of_all = n/length(unique(Isoform_classifiers_w_diff_isoforms))) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Feature = factor(Feature, levels = Recurring_features_order)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(y = Feature, x = percent_of_all))+
  geom_col()+
  labs(title = 'Features in classifiers',
         subtitle = '"Noteworthy" in at least 1 classifier detecting different',
          y = 'Feature',
          x = 'Proportion of classifiers')+
  theme_bw(base_size = 16)


#For most recurring features (e.g. the ones that are found in at least 3 (lower) or 4 of stat isoform classifiers, we can examine)
combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Gene_name != 'PosControl') %>% 
  dplyr::filter(adj_significant == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(noteworthy_feature == TRUE) %>% 
    dplyr::filter(!Feature == 'Intensity_Edge_max_norm') %>% 
  group_by(Feature) %>% 
  summarize(n = n(),
            percent_of_all = n/length(unique(Isoform_classifiers_w_diff_isoforms))) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Feature = factor(Feature, levels = Recurring_features_order)) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(n >= 2) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(y = Feature, x = percent_of_all))+
  geom_col()+
  labs(title = 'Features in classifiers',
         subtitle = '"Noteworthy" in at least 2 classifiers detecting different',
          y = 'Feature',
          x = 'Proportion of classifiers')+
  theme_bw(base_size = 16)


# Count of feature represenation in major categories. Occurs at least 2x
Represented_feature_classes %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  # Counts the number of times each feature occur
  group_by(Feature, major_class, minor_class) %>%
  summarize(n_feature_recurrence = n()) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(n_feature_recurrence >= 2) %>% 
  # Counts how many of the minor classes are represented 
  ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::select(Feature, major_class) %>%
  distinct() %>% 
  group_by(major_class) %>% 
  summarize(n_features_noteworthy = n()) %>% 
  # The plot
  ggplot(aes(y = fct_reorder(major_class, n_features_noteworthy), x = n_features_noteworthy))+
  geom_col()+
  labs(title = 'Number of "Noteworthy" features in each major category',
       subtitle = 'Occurs at least 2 time',
       y = 'Main Feature groups',
       x = 'Count (n)')+
  theme_bw(base_size = 16)
  
# How large a proportion of the subclasses within a major class are used?
# Counting the degree to which minor from each major class are represented
Represented_feature_classes %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  # Counts the number of times each feature occur
  group_by(Feature, major_class, minor_class) %>%
  summarize(n_feature_recurrence = n()) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(n_feature_recurrence >= 2) %>% 
  # Counts how many of the minor classes are represented 
  ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::select(major_class, minor_class) %>%
  distinct() %>% 
  group_by(major_class) %>% 
  summarize(n_occurence = n()) %>% 
  #
  dplyr::right_join(x = ., y = Feature_classes %>% 
                      ungroup() %>% 
                      dplyr::select(major_class, minor_class) %>% 
                      distinct() %>% 
                      group_by(major_class) %>% 
                      summarize(n_total = n()),
                    by = join_by(major_class)
) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(n_occurence = if_else(is.na(n_occurence),0,n_occurence),
                proportion_represented = n_occurence/n_total) %>% 
  dplyr::arrange(proportion_represented) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  # The plot
  ggplot(aes(y = fct_reorder(major_class,proportion_represented), x = proportion_represented))+
  geom_col()+
  geom_text(aes(x = 0.9, label = paste(n_occurence,'/',n_total)), size = 5)+
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0,1))+
  labs(title = 'Proportion of sub-feature groups occuring as "Noteworthy"',
       subtitle = 'Occurs at least 2 times',
       y = 'Main Feature groups',
       x = 'Proportion of subgroups occuring')+
  theme_bw(base_size = 16)


# Percent of features that remain noteworthy (when required to occur at least 2x)
Represented_feature_classes %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  # Counts the number of times each feature occur
  group_by(Feature, major_class, minor_class) %>%
  summarize(n_feature_recurrence = n()) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(n_feature_recurrence >= 2) %>% 
  # Counts how many of the minor classes are represented 
  ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::select(Feature, major_class) %>%
  distinct() %>% 
  group_by(major_class) %>% 
  summarize(n_occurence_more_than_1x = n()) %>% 
  #
  dplyr::right_join(x = ., y = Represented_feature_classes %>% 
                      ungroup() %>% 
                      dplyr::select(Feature, major_class) %>%
                      distinct() %>% 
                      group_by(major_class) %>% 
                      summarize(n_occurence_1x = n()),
                    by = join_by(major_class)) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(n_occurence_more_than_1x = if_else(is.na(n_occurence_more_than_1x),0, n_occurence_more_than_1x),
                proportion_represented = n_occurence_more_than_1x/n_occurence_1x) %>% 
  dplyr::arrange(proportion_represented) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  # The plot
  ggplot(aes(y = fct_reorder(major_class,proportion_represented), x = proportion_represented))+
  geom_col()+
  geom_text(aes(x = 0.9, label = paste(n_occurence_more_than_1x,'/',n_occurence_1x)), size = 5)+
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0,1))+
  labs(title = 'Proportion of sub-feature groups occuring as "Noteworthy"',
       subtitle = 'Occurs at least 2 times',
       y = 'Main Feature groups',
       x = 'Proportion of subgroups occuring')+
  theme_bw(base_size = 16)
```

### Plot of importance metric for the recurring features (occuring at least 3 or 4 times)
```{r Importance metric ratio x score plotted for each recurring feature with linerange and mean, echo=FALSE}
### 3x recurring
# Recurring features order, occurence at least 3x
Recurring_features_order_n3 <- combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Gene_name != 'PosControl') %>% 
  dplyr::filter(adj_significant == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(noteworthy_feature == TRUE) %>% 
  group_by(Feature) %>% 
  summarize(n = n(),
            percent_of_all = n/length(unique(Isoform_classifiers_w_diff_isoforms))) %>% 
  #Arrange with lowest on top
  dplyr::ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::filter(n >= 3) %>% 
  dplyr::arrange(n) %>% 
  dplyr::pull(Feature)

#Mean importance metric for 3 recurring
Feature_order_importance_metric_n3 <- combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Gene_name != 'PosControl') %>% 
  dplyr::filter(adj_significant == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(noteworthy_feature == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Feature %in% c(Recurring_features_order_n3)) %>%
  group_by(Feature) %>% 
  summarise(mean_importance = mean(ratio_times_importance)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::arrange(mean_importance) %>% 
  dplyr::pull(Feature)

#
Feature_summary_n3 <- combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Gene_name != 'PosControl') %>% 
  dplyr::filter(adj_significant == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(noteworthy_feature == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Feature %in% c(Recurring_features_order_n3)) %>%
  group_by(Feature) %>% 
  summarise(n_occurence = n(),
            min_importance = min(ratio_times_importance),
            max_importance = max(ratio_times_importance),
            mean_importance = mean(ratio_times_importance)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Feature = factor(Feature, levels = Feature_order_importance_metric_n3))

# Plot of importance metric (ratio x score) for recurring features
#View(combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg )

combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Gene_name != 'PosControl') %>% 
  dplyr::filter(adj_significant == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(noteworthy_feature == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Feature %in% c(Recurring_features_order_n3)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Feature = factor(Feature, levels = Feature_order_importance_metric_n3)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = ratio_times_importance, y = Feature))+
  geom_linerange(data = Feature_summary_n3, aes(xmin = min_importance, x = mean_importance, xmax = max_importance), alpha = 0.5)+
  geom_point(aes(fill = Gene_name), shape = 21, size = 4.5, color = 'black', alpha = 0.9, position = position_jitter(width = 0, height = 0.25))+
  geom_point(data = Feature_summary_n3, aes(x = mean_importance), shape = 'l', size = 6, color = 'black', alpha = 0.75)+
  geom_text(data = Feature_summary_n3, aes(x = 64, label = paste('n=',n_occurence)), size = 4.5)+
  geom_vline(xintercept = ratio_times_importance_threshold, color = 'red', linewidth = 1)+
  theme_bw(base_size = 16)+
  scale_x_continuous(transform = 'log2')+
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1,100))+
  labs(title = 'Importance of "Noteworthy" features',
       subtitle = 'Occurs at least 3 times',
       y = 'Feature',
       x = 'Feature contribution (%) x Contribution ratio',
       fill = 'Gene with isoforms')+
  theme_bw(base_size = 16)



### 4x recurring
# Recurring features order, occurence at least 4x
Recurring_features_order_n2 <- combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Gene_name != 'PosControl') %>% 
  dplyr::filter(adj_significant == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(noteworthy_feature == TRUE) %>% 
    dplyr::filter(!Feature == 'Intensity_Edge_max_norm') %>% 
  group_by(Feature) %>% 
  summarize(n = n(),
            percent_of_all = n/length(unique(Isoform_classifiers_w_diff_isoforms))) %>% 
  #Arrange with lowest on top
  dplyr::ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::filter(n >= 2) %>% 
  dplyr::arrange(n) %>% 
  dplyr::pull(Feature)

#Mean importance metric for4 recurring
Feature_order_importance_metric_n2 <- combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Gene_name != 'PosControl') %>% 
  dplyr::filter(adj_significant == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(noteworthy_feature == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Feature %in% c(Recurring_features_order_n2)) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!Feature == 'Intensity_Edge_max_norm') %>% 
  group_by(Feature) %>% 
  summarise(mean_importance = mean(ratio_times_importance)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::arrange(mean_importance) %>% 
  dplyr::pull(Feature)

# Feature summaries with recurrence at least 4x
Feature_summary_n2 <- combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Gene_name != 'PosControl') %>% 
  dplyr::filter(adj_significant == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(noteworthy_feature == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Feature %in% c(Recurring_features_order_n2)) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!Feature == 'Intensity_Edge_max_norm') %>% 
  group_by(Feature) %>% 
  summarise(n_occurence = n(),
            min_importance = min(ratio_times_importance),
            max_importance = max(ratio_times_importance),
            mean_importance = mean(ratio_times_importance)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Feature = factor(Feature, levels = Feature_order_importance_metric_n2))


# Plot of importance metric (ratio x score) for recurring features, at least 4x recurrence
combined_variable_importance_all_w_overall_posneg %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Gene_name != 'PosControl') %>% 
  dplyr::filter(adj_significant == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(noteworthy_feature == TRUE) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Feature %in% c(Recurring_features_order_n2)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Feature = factor(Feature, levels = Feature_order_importance_metric_n2)) %>% 
  # Removes intensity edge max norm, as I accidentally specified it to be the same as intensity edge mean norm (it has been like that for classifiers as well, but no point in doing everything again)
  dplyr::filter(!Feature == 'Intensity_Edge_max_norm') %>% 
  #
  ggplot(aes(x = ratio_times_importance, y = Feature))+
  geom_linerange(data = Feature_summary_n2 %>% 
                     dplyr::filter(!Feature == 'Intensity_Edge_max_norm'), aes(xmin = min_importance, x = mean_importance, xmax = max_importance), alpha = 0.5)+
  geom_point(aes(fill = Gene_name), shape = 21, size = 4, color = 'black', alpha = 0.9, position = position_jitter(width = 0, height = 0.25))+
  geom_point(data = Feature_summary_n2 %>% 
                     dplyr::filter(!Feature == 'Intensity_Edge_max_norm'), aes(x = mean_importance), shape = 'l', size = 6, color = 'black', alpha = 0.75)+
  geom_text(data = Feature_summary_n2 %>% 
                     dplyr::filter(!Feature == 'Intensity_Edge_max_norm'), aes(x = 64, label = paste('n=',n_occurence)), size = 4.5)+
  geom_vline(xintercept = ratio_times_importance_threshold, color = 'red', linewidth = 1)+
  theme_bw(base_size = 16)+
  scale_x_continuous(transform = 'log2')+
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1,100))+
  labs(title = 'Importance of "Noteworthy" features',
       subtitle = 'Occurs at least 2 times',
       y = 'Feature',
       x = 'Feature contribution (%) x Contribution ratio',
       fill = 'Gene with isoforms')+
  theme_bw(base_size = 16)

```
